other_observers: Mark Peterson, Brad Steger, Lisa Edwards, Kara Carragher, Brandon Percival, others were there also, but don’t remember everyone there.; Lisa Edwards and Kara Carragher were the original finders. It was also seen the next day.
specific_location: Fountain Creek, It was in a tree just behind the nature center.
description: Very black colored hawk. It had a short tail with long legs, which makes it not look like a Buteo (which it isn’t). It has bright yellow legs and a bright yellow bill with a dark tip. It is an all black bird, even black eyes. The tail (which isn’t shown in my photo) had some thick bands. First from the end of the tail was a thin stripe of white, when a thick black band, and finally a thick white band.Behaviors: All I saw the bird do is sit in a tree and look around.Call: Didn’t hear itPlumage: Adult
